response.overview: In the documentary "Sense of Justice" Lidia, María Antonia and Erick tell us about the barriers in access to justice in México in cases of femicide: Elvia, Lidia's sister; Nadia, María Antonia's daughter and Alí, Erick's sister. This short film explores individual and collective impact, in a patriarchal society, that gender stereotypes in the administration of justice cause. Therefore, togheter with other relatives of victims of femicide, the protagonists of this story continue to work together to strengthen and reversing impunity in order to build a meaningful justice
response.title: Sense of Justice
